sentences.target: Ich brauche die Anmeldung für den Kurs.
sentences.reading: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊxə diː ˈanmɛldʊŋ fyːɐ̯ deːn kʊʁs/

translations.de: Ich brauche die Anmeldung für den Kurs.
translations.ipa: /ɪç ˈbʁaʊxə diː ˈanmɛldʊŋ fyːɐ̯ deːn kʊʁs/
translations.en: I need the registration for the course.
translations.es: Necesito el formulario de inscripción del curso.
translations.fr: J’ai besoin du formulaire d’inscription au cours.
translations.it: Ho bisogno del modulo di iscrizione al corso.
translations.zh-Hans: 我需要这门课的报名表。
translations.yue: 我需要呢個課程嘅報名表。
translations.ru: Мне нужна форма для записи на курс.
translations.pt: Eu preciso do formulário de inscrição do curso.
translations.he: אני צריך את טופס ההרשמה לקורס.
translations.vi: Tôi cần mẫu đăng ký khóa học.
translations.nl: Ik heb het inschrijfformulier voor de cursus nodig.
translations.uk: Мені потрібна форма реєстрації на курс.
translations.hu: Szükségem van a tanfolyam jelentkezési lapjára.
translations.hi: मुझे कोर्स के लिए पंजीकरण फॉर्म चाहिए.
translations.el: Χρειάζομαι τη φόρμα εγγραφής για το μάθημα.
translations.ro: Am nevoie de formularul de înscriere la curs.
translations.da: Jeg har brug for tilmeldingsskemaet til kurset.
translations.ja: 講座の申込書が必要です。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the clause.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 1st person singular; transitive and selects an accusative object.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of ‘Anmeldung’ as direct object.
Common noun, feminine; accusative direct object of ‘brauche’.
Preposition governing accusative; introduces a prepositional phrase indicating purpose/target.
Definite article, masculine accusative singular; determiner of ‘Kurs’ within the PP.
Common noun, masculine; object of the preposition ‘für’.

sentences.target: Die Anmeldung ist vorne am Schalter.

translations.de: Die Anmeldung ist vorne am Schalter.
translations.en: The registration is at the front counter.
translations.es: La inscripción está en el mostrador de la entrada.
translations.it: L’iscrizione si fa allo sportello all’ingresso.
translations.pt: A inscrição é no balcão da frente.
translations.vi: Đăng ký ở quầy phía trước.
translations.ar: التسجيل عند مكتب الاستقبال في الأمام.
translations.nl: De inschrijving is bij de balie vooraan.
translations.hu: A jelentkezés elöl a pultnál van.
translations.hi: पंजीकरण आगे वाले काउंटर पर है.
translations.pl: Rejestracja jest przy ladzie z przodu.
translations.el: Η εγγραφή γίνεται στο μπροστινό γκισέ.
translations.sv: Anmälan är vid disken längst fram.
translations.ro: Înscrierea este la ghișeul din față.
translations.ja: 受付は前のカウンターです。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, feminine nominative singular; determiner of the subject ‘Anmeldung’.
Common noun, feminine; subject of the copular clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to a locative predicate.
Adverb of place indicating location (‘at the front’).
Contraction of ‘an dem’; preposition ‘an’ with definite article (dative singular), introducing the PP ‘am Schalter’.
Common noun, masculine; dative singular object of ‘an’ in the PP.

sentences.target: Meine Anmeldung ist noch nicht fertig.

translations.de: Meine Anmeldung ist noch nicht fertig.
translations.es: Mi inscripción aún no está lista.
translations.fr: Mon inscription n’est pas encore terminée.
translations.it: La mia iscrizione non è ancora pronta.
translations.pt: Minha inscrição ainda não está pronta.
translations.vi: Việc đăng ký của tôi vẫn chưa xong.
translations.nl: Mijn inschrijving is nog niet klaar.
translations.hi: मेरा पंजीकरण अभी पूरा नहीं हुआ है.
translations.pl: Moja rejestracja jeszcze nie jest gotowa.
translations.el: Η εγγραφή μου δεν έχει τελειώσει ακόμα.
translations.nb: Påmeldingen min er ikke ferdig ennå.
translations.sv: Min anmälan är inte klar ännu.
translations.ro: Înscrierea mea nu este încă gata.
translations.da: Min tilmelding er ikke færdig endnu.
translations.ja: 私の申し込みはまだ終わっていません。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner, feminine nominative singular; modifies the subject noun.
Common noun, feminine; subject of the clause.
Copular auxiliary linking the subject to the predicative complement.
Temporal adverb indicating continuation of the state.
Negation particle; scopes over the predicate, denying completion.
Predicative adjective expressing state; complement of ‘sein’.

translations.en: He is bringing the registration tomorrow.
translations.es: Mañana trae el formulario de inscripción.
translations.fr: Il apporte le formulaire d’inscription demain.
translations.it: Domani porta il modulo di iscrizione.
translations.ru: Он принесёт форму для записи завтра.
translations.pt: Ele vai trazer o formulário de inscrição amanhã.
translations.he: הוא יביא את טופס ההרשמה מחר.
translations.vi: Ngày mai anh ấy sẽ mang mẫu đăng ký đến.
translations.uk: Він принесе форму для реєстрації завтра.
translations.el: Θα φέρει την αίτηση εγγραφής αύριο.
translations.nb: Han tar med påmeldingsskjemaet i morgen.
translations.id: Dia akan membawa formulir pendaftaran besok.
translations.sv: Han tar med anmälningsblanketten i morgon.
translations.ro: El aduce formularul de înscriere mâine.
translations.da: Han tager tilmeldingsskemaet med i morgen.
translations.ja: 彼は申込書を明日持ってきます。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Finite main verb, present indicative, 3rd person singular; transitive, taking an accusative object.
Definite article, feminine accusative singular; determiner of the direct object.
Common noun, feminine; accusative direct object of ‘bringt’.
Temporal adverb specifying time of the action.
